modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to freeze or unfreeze rows or columns in Google Sheets.

full_description_text: User is trying to freeze or unfreeze rows or columns. The feature is not responding as expected. This issue affects their ability to manage data visibility effectively.
